questions.question: Numbers-driven check for Investment Analyst work using Equity research while handling 'Research securities': Company EBITDA £2m, multiple 8×, net debt £3m. Estimate equity value.
questions.why_asked: Tests numerical and analytical competence in Equity research — essential for Investment Analyst roles.

calculation.prompt: Company EBITDA £2m, multiple 8×, net debt £3m. Estimate equity value.
calculation.answer: EV = 2 × 8 = £16m. Equity = EV − net debt = £13m (before adjustments for cash, pensions, working capital).

Subtract net debt
Note adjustment items

Quoting tabulated values without verifying edition/date of standard.
